name: test-duration
description: Duration in seconds the node interface(s) will be brought down

name: node-selector
description: Node selector to target nodes in the format "<selector>=<value>". A workload pod will be scheduled on each selected node. If left empty a random node will be selected
validation_message: Node selector must be in the format: key=value

name: node-name
description: The specific node name to target. If set, takes precedence over node-selector

name: namespace
description: Namespace where the scenario workload pod will be deployed

name: instance-count
description: Number of nodes to target when multiple nodes match the node-selector

name: execution
description: When multiple nodes are targeted, execute the scenario on all of them in parallel or serial

name: interfaces
description: Comma-separated list of network interfaces to bring down (e.g. eth0,eth1). If empty, the default interface is auto-detected
validation_message: Interfaces must be a comma-separated list: eth0 or eth0,eth1,eth2

name: recovery-time
description: Additional time in seconds to wait after the node becomes Ready again before proceeding (allows the node to stabilize)

name: wait-duration
description: Time in seconds to wait between scenarios when multiple scenario configs are defined in the same file

name: image
description: The container image used to run the interface-down workload on the node

name: service-account
description: The service account associated with the scenario workload pod

name: taints
description: Comma-separated list of tolerations to assign to the workload pod so it can be scheduled on tainted nodes
